---
title: "Module 3: Need for dimensionality reduction"
format: html
---

Biological datasets often contain thousands of features, making them difficult to visualize and interpret directly. Dimensionality reduction provides a way to summarize this information while preserving important patterns.

**What you’ll explore:**

- Why dimensionality reduction is needed  
- How Principal Component Analysis (PCA) summarizes variation in data  
- How to interpret principal components in a biological context  
- How much variation is captured by each component  

The full content for this module will be released on the morning of the workshop!
